S.FORM: == baha' == baha' ga, syan ta' sbil musa' rgyax. baha' ga ppngan qaya' musa' rgyax.
S.PHON: == βaħaʔ == βaħaʔ ɣa, s~ɕjan taʔ s~ɕβil mus~ɕaʔ rɣjax. βaħaʔ ɣa ppŋan qajaʔ mus~ɕaʔ rɣjax.
S.FORM: == baha' == baha' ga, syan ta' sbil musa' rgyax. baha' ga ppngan qaya' musa' rgyax.
S.PHON: == βaħaʔ == βaħaʔ ɣa, s~ɕjan taʔ s~ɕβil mus~ɕaʔ rɣjax. βaħaʔ ɣa ppŋan qajaʔ mus~ɕaʔ rɣjax.
